---
title: "St. Stephen’s Native Girls School"
---

## St. Stephen’s Native Girls School

**Type:** organization

### About

On the history of this school see Joan C. Stanley, 'Kissling, Margaret 1808 - 1891'. <i>Dictionary of New Zealand Biography</i>, www.dnzb.govt.nz/  Mentioned in no 87.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
